title: Replace OpenAI with a really OpenSource alternative
summary:
I think it's in the spirit of Fediverse to focus on open-source and, if possible, free software.

Firstly, this would be less repulsive for certain communities and, secondly, it would reduce the cost of running a server, making Vernissage more accessible.

title: OpenAI Node: Analyze Image only shows GPT-4o models, excludes newer vision-capable models
summary:
### Bug Description

The Analyze Image operation's model dropdown only shows models containing `vision` or `gpt-4o` in their ID. This is because `imageModelSearch` in `listSearch.ts` uses a stale whitelist filter:

```typescript
(model) => model.id.includes('vision') || model.id.includes('gpt-4o')
`

title: 10 minutes http client timeout is too low when image generation is done on CPU
summary:
### What is the issue?

[This line](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/x/imagegen/server.go#L58) sets the 10 minute timeout regardless of the hardware.

This is maybe fine on a GPU, but is certainly too low for a CPU.
The timeout should be at least an hour or more when CPU is used.

title: [PR] feat(local_ai): default to cloud fallback on <8GB RAM devices

- Adds a soft RAM floor (8 GB) for local AI: devices below 8 GB default to **disabled (cloud fallback)** instead of downloading and running the 1B param Gemma model via Ollama.
- The user can still opt into local AI on a low-RAM device — this is a **default**, not a hard gate.

title: [PR] feat: Add /ollama-setup wizard for local and cloud configuration
summary:
## Summary

Implements #1 — adds an interactive `/ollama-setup` command that guides users through connecting to Ollama, whether locally or via ollama.com cloud.

## What changed

- **`/ollama-setup` command** — interactive TUI wizard:
  - **Step 1**: Local vs Cloud
  - **Local**: installs Ollama CLI
